name: Alpha Phase Goggles
effectsRaw: Visibility 1: Allows you to see what's otherwise invisible the phase tile puzzles opposite side. Also allows you to see and attack death-hex phase wraiths when the Black Abbot summons them. Be warned however: You will not be able to see much anything else except the phase wraiths if you wear these goggles on the main platform.
Drops on leaving adventure, Drops on death: Temporary raid-only item.
